description: Chaos unfolds at Afterlife as Jiaying claims that Gonzales threatened and shot her. Skye rushes to her aid, helped by Lincoln and Alisha, while Simmons tries to offer medical attention but is rebuffed. May and Simmons coordinate an evacuation with Coulson and the Playground, and tensions escalate as Skye insists S.H.I.E.L.D. is to blame. May and Skye face off, with Skye refusing to stand down, and a brief confrontation unfolds about loyalty and the incident.

transcript.line: Mom! What happened?
Gonzales... he... he said that we were... that Inhumans should be exterminated. He had a gun. No, stay with me, please. Gordon will take care of him. Get everyone to safety.
Everyone, this way!
Let me take a look at that.
S.H.I.E.L.D.'s done enough. We have our own doctors. I'll be fine in time. Right now we have more pressing concerns.
You should get out of here.
What about you?
Come on.
Have you had any contact with Bobbi? Her Quinjet still hasn't arrived, and she's not answering communications.
How's Skye?
Disappointed that you aren't the one meeting with her mother.
Agent May. Sir, there's been gunfire. Skye's mother's been shot, allegedly by Gonzales. I'm afraid it's going to get worse.
What about Gonzales? Where's he?
I don't know.
Got what he always wanted.
No. He wouldn't do that. It has to be something else. Find Gonzales. Get everyone out. I don't want to escalate the situation till we find out what we're dealing with.
Have all three birds ready to fly the second I return. He may be a part of it. Make sure he's secured.
Agent May wants all Quinjets ready for evacuation. Prep for takeoff.
Something's happening. The teleporter's moving.
We need to get you to the doctors.
Okay.
Come on! Help me!
Why would you let them do this to us? I thought you were on our side.
I am. I-I had no idea, I swear.
Jiaying, I'm here.
We got to get you out of here.
Skye, stop!
What have you done?
That's what we're trying to figure out, but you need to stand down. Stand down?
After Gonzales just shot my Mom and declared war on us? You're the one who needs to stand down.
I need to see Gonzales. Where is he? We can fix this.
It's too late to fix this. Now take your men and get the hell out of here.
Not until I see Gonzales.
I don't want to hurt you!
You won't.
Stop wasting time, Skye, help me fix this.
I'm sorry, May, you're not welcome here.
